case_title: SECOND ROUND SUB, LLC VS. MARIE GRACIE GRANT ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: VENUE (TRANSACTION ID # 66492655) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SECOND ROUND SUB, LLC ASSIGNEE OF COMENITY CAPITAL BANK (FOREVER 21)

DECLARATION OR AFFIDAVIT IN SUPPORT OF REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 585(D) (TRANSACTION ID # 100163779) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SECOND ROUND SUB, LLC ASSIGNEE OF COMENITY CAPITAL BANK (FOREVER 21)

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100163779) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 66492655) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SECOND ROUND SUB, LLC ASSIGNEE OF COMENITY CAPITAL BANK (FOREVER 21) AS TO DEFENDANT GRANT, MARIE GRACIE DOES 1 TO 10 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-04-2021
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 66492655) TO PLAINTIFF SECOND ROUND SUB, LLC ASSIGNEE OF COMENITY CAPITAL BANK (FOREVER 21)

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200030442), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SECOND ROUND SUB, LLC ASSIGNEE OF COMENITY CAPITAL BANK (FOREVER 21) SERVED MAY-12-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE MAY-13-2021 AS TO DEFENDANT GRANT, MARIE GRACIE

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $282.40 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100163779) AS TO DEFENDANT GRANT, MARIE GRACIE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SECOND ROUND SUB, LLC ASSIGNEE OF COMENITY CAPITAL BANK (FOREVER 21) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRANT, MARIE GRACIE $1,951.69 PRINCIPAL, $282.40 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,234.09, SEE SCANNED DOC

DECLARATION RE: FEE (TRANSACTION ID # 66492655) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SECOND ROUND SUB, LLC ASSIGNEE OF COMENITY CAPITAL BANK (FOREVER 21)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-24-2022 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-24-2022 CONTINUED TO JUL-26-2022 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-25-2022 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
